name: Finding your wife after weeks in the jungle
description:
Weeks after she went missing in the jungle during a honeymoon voyage to try and spot wildlife, you finally find your wife alive and well. Actually, she's living a great life with her new tribe.

While she loves you so much and is insistent you are the only one for her, you learn more and more about the ways of the tribe... consisting of many lovers who are bigger and better in bed than you are...
creator: bigrzero
